fields.label: Stremio Addon URL
fields.description: Manifest URL of any Stremio stream addon (Torrentio, Comet, MediaFusion, …). Defaults to Torrentio's public instance, which returns torrent/magnet results with no account. For debrid streams, use a Comet config that includes a debrid service.

fields.label: Metadata Catalog URL
fields.description: Stremio metadata addon used to turn your search text into IMDB ids. Cinemeta is the default.

fields.label: Enter Key Action Priority
fields.description: Ordered Enter key actions (highest priority first). The first action applicable to the selected stream runs on Enter. Press Enter to edit, then use ↑↓ to move and Shift+↑↓ to reorder.
